name: Hue and Hoi An At A Glance 4 days
highlights: Explore the Imperial City of Hue's old fortress and palace, as well as the immense history behind its walls
Visit a Hue garden house that is off-the-beaten-path and learn about "feng shui" methods
Explore Hoi An's colonial townscapes and enjoy a sense of relaxation
Discover several cultural sites and learn about the history with a local tour guide

itinerary.title: Hue City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

- 8:15-8:30: Get ready at the hotel

- Start the trip by visiting Tu Duc Tomb and Khai Dinh Tomb, the mystical cultural values of the Nguyen Dynasty

- Move on to explore the royal life at Imperial City and Forbidden Purple City at Hue Citadel

- Have lunch in a local restaurant

Afternoon

- Take a boat trip on the Perfume River to admire the poetic ambiance of Hue City

- Flow gently to visit the 400-year-old Thien Mu Pagoda

- Enjoy Hue's lovely daily life at Dong Ba Market

- 17:00: Drive back to the hotel

itinerary.title: Hoi An Free Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

- 6:00: Check out and have breakfast at the hotel in Hue

- Take a 3-hour shuttle bus to Hoi An

- Free to explore Hoi An ancient town (Optional suggestion: Hoi An Memories Show)

Travel To Hoi An Ancient Town

itinerary.title: My Son Sanctuary
itinerary.description:
Morning

- 8:00-8:30: Get in the car to My Son Sanctuary

- Explore the groups of temples and learn about the history of Champa with a local tour guide

- Visit the Sa Huynh Champa Culture Museum in Tra Kieu on the way back to Hoi An

- 12:00: Return to the hotel 

Afternoon & Night

- Free to explore Hoi An ancient town at nightlife

- Try the best local street food in the town

itinerary.title: Hoi An Departue
itinerary.description:
Morning

- Check out at the hotel and leave for Da Nang international airport

included: Accommodation in Twin/ Double sharing, except overnight at local homestay and overnight train
All transport within tour as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
